test.name: Process Loan File Zip And Upload

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Process Loan File And Upload Report
Process All Loan Rows And Save Output
Read Loan Data
kw.doc: Read loan data from Excel and return rows for Robot Framework.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.doc: Save processed loan rows to a new Excel file.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

test.status: NoSuchWindowException: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6379829c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6376aa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff63740db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6373e4322] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff637496e86] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6374b3482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff637459298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff63745a183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6379ade0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6379a8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6379c9d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6376c6785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6376cfacc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6376b3634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6376b37e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff637697e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffed015e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffed10ec40c+2c]

errors.msg: This is a deprecated import that will be removed in favor of Autosphere.Browser.Selenium

Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6379829c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6376aa0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff63740db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6373e4322] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff637496e86] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6374b3482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff637459298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff63745a183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6379ade0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6379a8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6379c9d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6376c6785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6376cfacc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6376b3634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6376b37e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff637697e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffed015e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffed10ec40c+2c]
